payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the source fetch failed with a 404/network error. No article claims were available to extract or store.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable source content was available because the provided article URL could not be fetched and returned a 404/network error.

details: Input requested remembering an article at a malformed or unavailable URL: https -//examplecom/missing
Mock fetch result indicated: 404 network error
No memory cards were created because source claims could not be verified from the provided input.

repair_options: Provide a summary or specific takeaways you want remembered, clearly marked as your own notes if not sourced from the article.
